description: Java entity class representing supporting document metadata stored in a database, including fields like UUIDs, filename, content type, size, hash, storage key, metadata, and creation timestamp.

classes.name: SupportingDocument
classes.description: Entity class for supporting document metadata, with fields for identifiers, filename, content type, size, hash, storage key, metadata, and creation timestamp, along with getter and setter methods.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the supporting document.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the supporting document.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the document.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with the document.

methods.name: getLoanDraftId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the loan draft associated with the document.

methods.name: setLoanDraftId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the loan draft associated with the document.

methods.name: getOriginalFilename
methods.description: Returns the original filename of the document.

methods.name: setOriginalFilename
methods.description: Sets the original filename of the document.

methods.name: getContentType
methods.description: Returns the content type of the document.

methods.name: setContentType
methods.description: Sets the content type of the document.

methods.name: getSizeBytes
methods.description: Returns the size of the document in bytes.

methods.name: setSizeBytes
methods.description: Sets the size of the document in bytes.

methods.name: getSha256Hex
methods.description: Returns the SHA-256 hash of the document in hex format.

methods.name: setSha256Hex
methods.description: Sets the SHA-256 hash of the document.

methods.name: getStorageKey
methods.description: Returns the storage key referencing the stored file.

methods.name: setStorageKey
methods.description: Sets the storage key referencing the stored file.

methods.name: getMetadata
methods.description: Returns the JSON metadata associated with the document.

methods.name: setMetadata
methods.description: Sets the JSON metadata associated with the document.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the document was created.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the document was created.
